---
title: "Get in touch"
---

I'm a scientist who became a biostatistician, finishing my Master's in Biostatistics at the University of Florida (graduating Spring 2027) and looking for roles in clinical research, CROs, and pharmaceutical analytics. If my work looks like a fit for your team — or you just want to talk shop about R and reproducible research — send a note. I read everything and reply within a day or two.

📧 **Email:** [jonathanmu13\@gmail.com](mailto:jonathanmu13@gmail.com)

💼 **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/jonathan-muniz-fl](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-muniz-fl)

You can also find my work on [GitHub](https://github.com/Jonathanmuniz13) and [Kaggle](https://www.kaggle.com/themuniz).
